metadata.title: 3rd Pass Local Debug: SWAG + Calibration Metrics Validation
metadata.priority: P0 — validates SWAG + calibration before GCP spend
metadata.monitoring: factorial-monitor skill for flow tracking + timing
metadata.estimated-time: 30-45 min (DynUNet 2 epochs + SWAG 5 epochs + inference + biostatistics)

context.summary:
Local validation of the NEW pipeline components before GCP: 1. Train DynUNet for 2 epochs (1 fold, 1 loss) — verify training loop with calibration metrics 2. Run SWAG for 5 additional epochs — verify SWAG produces diverse posterior samples 3. Run Analysis Flow with ALL 20 calibration metrics — verify metric computation 4. Run Biostatistics Flow — verify calibration metrics in ANOVA
This is the MINIMAL validation. One model, one fold, one loss. The purpose is to verify that the new code WORKS, not to evaluate segmentation quality.
Hardware: RTX 2070 Super (8 GB VRAM), 64 GB RAM, CUDA 12.6 Data: 70 MiniVess volumes locally at data/raw/minivess/
context.scope:
Training: 1 model (dynunet) × 1 loss (cbdice_cldice) × 1 fold (fold-0) × 2 epochs SWAG: 5 additional epochs with SWALR, 30 posterior samples Analysis: Evaluate on MiniVess validation (24 volumes), ALL calibration metrics Biostatistics: ANOVA on 2 conditions (none vs swag) with calibration response variables
Key calibration response variables for ANOVA: - ECE (global calibration — standard baseline) - pECE (false-positive overconfidence — vessel-specific) - BA-ECE (boundary calibration — spatial)

metric.name: ECE
metric.why: Standard baseline, comparable to all literature

metric.name: BA-ECE
metric.why: Calibration WHERE it matters — vessel boundaries

phase.name: Pre-Flight Verification
phase.description: Verify ALL new components are implemented before running. This phase validates the output of calibration-and-swag-implementation-plan.xml.

task.title: Verify SWAG plugin exists and imports

tasks.task: uv run python -c "from minivess.pipeline.calibration_metrics import compute_all_calibration_metrics"

task.title: Verify training loop computes Tier 1 calibration metrics

tasks.task: Check that SegmentationMetrics.compute() returns ECE, MCE, Brier, NLL, BUC.

phase.gate: All new components verified. No guessing.

phase.name: Train DynUNet (2 Epochs)
phase.description:
Train a DynUNet model for 2 epochs on fold-0 with cbdice_cldice loss. This is MINIMAL — just enough to verify the training loop computes calibration metrics during validation.
Key verification: val_ece, val_mce, val_brier logged to MLflow.

task.title: Train DynUNet with calibration metrics in val loop

tasks.task:
MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run python scripts/run_local_debug_3flow.py (modified to train 2 epochs instead of using existing checkpoints)
Verify: MLflow run has val_ece, val_mce, val_brier metrics.
Check: best_val_loss.pth exists, checkpoint_metadata.json exists, all 6+ best-metric checkpoints saved.

phase.gate: Training produces checkpoint with calibration metrics logged.
phase.timing: Expected: ~5 min (2 epochs × ~2.5 min/epoch on RTX 2070 Super)

phase.name: SWAG Post-Training (5 Epochs)
phase.description:
Run SWAG for 5 additional epochs starting from the 2-epoch checkpoint. Uses SWALR schedule, collects weight statistics, recalibrates BN.
This is the REAL test of the SWAG implementation. Must verify: - SWALR schedule is applied - Weight mean and covariance are tracked - update_bn() recalibrates batch normalization - K=30 posterior samples are diverse (different predictions)

task.title: Run SWAG plugin on the trained checkpoint

tasks.task:
Execute SWAGPlugin with: - swa_lr=0.01 (from config) - swa_epochs=5 - max_rank=10 (low rank for debug) - n_samples=30
Verify: SWAG model file saved, metrics logged.
Load SWAG model, sample 5 models, compute predictions on 1 volume. Verify: predictions are DIFFERENT (not identical — this catches the "checkpoint averaging masquerading as SWAG" anti-pattern).
Compare BN running_mean/running_var before and after update_bn(). They MUST change — if they don't, BN update is broken.

phase.gate: SWAG produces diverse posterior samples. BN recalibrated.
phase.timing: Expected: ~7 min (5 epochs × ~1.5 min/epoch, no full validation)

phase.name: Analysis Flow with ALL Calibration Metrics
phase.description:
Evaluate the trained model (none) and SWAG model on MiniVess validation. Compute ALL 20 calibration metrics for each model.
This is the critical validation that ALL calibration metrics produce non-trivial values on real data.

task.title: Evaluate baseline (none) model with all calibration metrics

tasks.task: Load the 2-epoch checkpoint, run sliding-window inference on 24 val volumes. Compute ALL Tier 1 + Tier 2 calibration metrics per volume. Log to MLflow: eval/fold_0/vol/{id}/{metric} for each metric.

task.title: Evaluate SWAG model with all calibration metrics

tasks.task: Load SWAG model, sample 30 posterior models, average predictions. Compute ALL calibration metrics on the ensemble prediction. Also compute: epistemic uncertainty (mutual information), aleatoric uncertainty.

task.title: Verify ALL 20 calibration metrics are non-zero

tasks.task: Check that ECE, MCE, ACE, pECE, CECE, TACE, SCE, BA-ECE, SPACE, BUC, Brier, NLL, CRPS, RMSCE, D-ECE, OE, smECE, Uncertainty-Dice-AUC all produce non-trivial values. Zero or NaN = bug.
Check: Brier map (.npz), NLL map (.npz) saved as MLflow artifacts. Check: Reliability diagram (.png) generated.

phase.gate: ALL 20 calibration metrics computed. No zeros, no NaNs.

phase.name: Biostatistics Flow with Calibration ANOVA
phase.description: Run biostatistics on the analysis results. Verify that calibration metrics are included in the factorial ANOVA alongside DSC/clDice.

tasks.task: Use configs/biostatistics/smoke_local.yaml updated with calibration metrics. Verify: ANOVA includes ECE, pECE, BA-ECE as response variables.

task.title: Verify DuckDB has calibration metric columns

tasks.task: Query DuckDB for eval_metrics table — must include all calibration metrics.

task.title: Verify pairwise comparisons on calibration metrics

tasks.task: Check: none vs swag compared on ECE, pECE, BA-ECE. Expected: SWAG should have lower ECE than none (better calibrated).

phase.name: Report + Test Suite

tasks.task: docs/planning/run-debug-factorial-experiment-report-3rd-pass-local.md Include: ALL calibration metric values for both conditions, SWAG diversity verification, timing breakdown, issues found.
All tests pass. 0 new failures from SWAG + calibration implementation.

phase.gate: Report written. Tests pass. Ready for GCP.

execution-script.description: Deterministic execution script for the 3rd pass debug. NO screen, NO tmux, NO nohup. Direct execution.

steps.step: Set all env vars (MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1, MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI=mlruns, etc.)
Phase 1: Train DynUNet 2 epochs (uv run via Prefect test harness)
Phase 2: Run SWAG 5 epochs on checkpoint
Phase 3: Evaluate both models with ALL calibration metrics

monitoring.note: Monitor GPU VRAM during SWAG (DynUNet is lightweight, expect ~3 GB)
Monitor calibration metric computation time (Tier 1 vs Tier 2)
